body_plan.core_shape: extremely long flat ribbon-like body, tapering slightly with a rounded knob at one end

parts.placement: on the rounded knob at right end of body

parts.shape: irregular rounded loop outlines, varying sizes
parts.placement: scattered along the top surface of the ribbon body

parts.shape: dense row of short thin spikes
parts.placement: running along entire bottom edge of body
far right end of body, where eye sits

parts.shape: thin tapering point with small hooked flick

distinctive_features: single long flat gray ribbon body with no visible legs
one small spiral eye only at the bulbous right-end head
row of thin bristle-like spikes fringing the entire bottom edge
scattered open-loop spots decorating the top surface
tapering pointed tail at the left end
locomotion: undulates its long ribbon body side to side, using the bottom bristle-fringe like tiny legs/cilia to grip and ripple along surfaces
vibe: an impossibly long speckled eel-ribbon that fringe-walks on a thousand tiny bottom bristles
